title: oishiipie Vanilla Pack
description: NOTE: I had nothing to do with the creation of any of these mods, this is simply a collection of what I like to use myself.
body:
# Aiming to enhance Minecraft while retaining that Vanilla feel!
Key Features: Drastically increased FPS, updated HUD and UI elements, Mob Animations, QOL Updates such as better Statistics, Achievements, and much much more while aiming for a more stable gameplay keeping the Vanilla vibe of the game!

## NOTE: I had nothing to do with the creation of any of these mods, this is simply a collection of what I like to use myself.

1. [Fabric Installer.](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)
1. [Mrpack to Zip.](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/)
